Handcrafted in Every Detail

Forged by
Hand.
Made to Last.

Custom knives and fine leatherwork. Every piece is an original — built for beauty, balance, and a lifetime of use.

View the Gallery Commission a Piece
Hand
Forged Steel
One of a
Kind — Always
Fine
Leatherwork
The Craft

Every Piece Begins
at the Forge

J.M. Amoedo custom work is built from raw materials — steel drawn under heat and hammer, leather cut and stitched by hand. No two pieces are the same.

Whether you need a kitchen blade, a field knife, a collector's piece, or fine leatherwork — every order starts with a conversation about how it will be used and what it needs to be.

Meet the Maker
The Collection

Browse by Type

Kitchen & Chef's

Culinary blades for the serious cook — chef's knives, santokus, cleavers and more.

View Gallery

Hunting & Field

Fixed-blade field knives built for hard use in demanding conditions.

View Gallery

Collector's Pieces

Art knives and presentation blades — exceptional materials, display-ready finish.

View Gallery

Fine Leatherwork

Handstitched sheaths, belts and leather goods crafted with the same care as the blades.

View Gallery
Recent Work

From the Workshop

View Full Gallery
Why Custom?

A Piece Built
Around You

Your dimensions

Handle length, blade geometry and weight tuned to how you work and what you carry.

Your materials

Steel grade, handle material, guard and finish — from working grade to heirloom quality.

Your purpose

Kitchen workhorse, hunting companion, collector's display piece, or a handstitched leather piece that lasts decades.

Your timeline

Every piece is made to order. Get in touch to discuss your project and current lead times.

Ready to Begin?

Commission Something
Extraordinary

Every knife, every leather piece — it starts with a conversation. Get in touch to discuss what you have in mind.

Start a Commission How It Works
